name: Hunting History with Steven Rinella
overview: Join world-renowned outdoorsman and author Steven Rinella as he dives into history’s greatest and most perplexing wilderness mysteries. With his deep knowledge of the wild, survival expertise, and unyielding curiosity and grit, Steve is uniquely positioned to look at these mysteries through a totally new lens, examining how people’s interactions with their environment may rewrite the narrative on some of our most iconic legends.

trailers.title: Hunting History with STEVEN RINELLA l New Series Premieres Tues. January 28 at 10/9c on HISTORY
